summary: A web application where users can add their own pages and posts.

existing_features.title: Add a 'Pages' section to the frontend where authenticated users can create a new custom page (title + content editor), view a list of all pages, edit their own pages, and delete their own pages. Display pages in a card grid consistent with the existing site theme (red accent #d9002c, Merriweather/Inter fonts).

Add a 'Posts' section to the frontend where authenticated users can create a new post (title + body editor), view a list of all posts in reverse-chronological order, edit their own posts, and delete their own posts. Style consistently with the existing academy theme.
Wire the frontend Pages and Posts sections to the backend using the existing useActor hook and React Query for data fetching, mutation, and cache invalidation.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow users to create and manage their own custom pages
Allow users to create and manage their own posts

Implement a backend data model and API for custom pages: each page has a unique ID, title, content (rich text or markdown), author, and creation/update timestamps. Expose create, read, update, and delete (CRUD) operations as query/update calls in the Motoko actor.

Implement a backend data model and API for posts: each post has a unique ID, title, body content, author, and creation/update timestamps. Expose CRUD operations for posts as query/update calls in the Motoko actor.
